reason: Replace four contradictory Djibouti payroll implementations with one reviewed monthly contract. The shared engine applies the Finance Law 2022 Article 7 eight-band ITS schedule, the taxable-remuneration exemption, CGI Articles 6 and 14, and official CNSS employee, employer and contribution-floor rules. English, French, Swahili, server and widget now use that one engine; the obsolete French formula route is a noindex handoff to the canonical French app.

fixtureDeltas.reason: The annual fixture is converted to a repeated monthly case and now applies 6% employee CNSS, the DJF 50,000 exemption, DJF 5,000 taxable-income floor, and the current marginal ITS bands.
The high-income fixture now reaches the statutory 45% top marginal band after employee CNSS and statutory taxable-income flooring instead of the obsolete six-band model.
The zero-income baseline remains zero and does not trigger a CNSS contribution floor.
